summary: Completed testing of DREAMOVEN Inventory App stock data fix and R2 upload. All features working correctly: Current Stock page shows correct data for all categories (Bakery: 575, Indian Grocery: 2863.5, Seafood: 105, Beverage: 1873.5), Dashboard shows accurate stats (1353 items, 446 lots), R2 upload endpoint working, GRN page with vendor dropdown and PO search functional.
passed_tests: API health endpoint returns healthy status
R2 storage configured and working (bucket: dreamoven-storage)
Admin login with correct credentials (parveenkatyal2312@gmail.com / admin@123)
Kitchen login with correct credentials (srpb@dreamoven.com / kitchen@123)
Invalid password correctly rejected with 401
Dashboard stats returns correct data (total_items=1353, total_lots=446, total_locations=15)
Current Stock API returns 1353 items
Bakery category has stock > 0 (55 items, 575 total stock) - FIX VERIFIED
Indian Grocery category has stock > 0 (260 items, 2863.5 total stock) - FIX VERIFIED
Seafood category has stock > 0 (45 items, 105 total stock) - FIX VERIFIED
Beverage category has stock > 0 (96 items, 1873.5 total stock)
Category filter on Current Stock API works correctly
R2 upload endpoint (/api/upload/base64) works - uploads to Cloudflare R2
Vendors list API returns 69+ vendors
Purchase orders API works with authentication
GRN list API works
Categories API returns all expected categories (Bakery, Indian Grocery, Seafood, Beverage)
UI: Admin login flow works correctly
UI: Current Stock page shows 1353 Total Items, 427 Today's GRN Items, 173 Below Par Stock, 1180 Stock OK
UI: Current Stock page shows all categories (Bakery, Indian Grocery, Seafood, Beverage, Chinese Grocery, Packaging)
UI: GRN page has Quick Search by PO number
UI: GRN page has vendor dropdown with all vendors
UI: GRN page has Receive Against PO, Direct Entry, Excel Upload tabs
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data (1353 items, 446 lots, 15 locations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock data fix verified - duplicate items (Dream Large Bag, Sona Masoori Rice) were cleaned up and lots now point to correct items. Categories that were showing 0 stock (Bakery, Indian Grocery, Seafood) now show correct stock values. R2 upload endpoint working for GRN photo uploads. GRN page updated to upload photos to Cloudflare R2 instead of storing base64 in MongoDB.
